⭐ Find Good Companies SCORED

Every company in this week's feed scored 0–120 on a composite: financial health (ROE, P/E, P/B, market cap) + momentum signals (order wins, M&A, capex, dividends, results) + sentiment (positive vs negative filings) + sector tailwind (is the broader sector hot this week?). Each card shows exactly why the company scored that way. All on this page — no clicking around.

📊 Overview — A week in Indian listed-company filings

Snapshot of every disclosure pulled into your investor feed between May 11 and May 17, 2026. KPIs below summarise volume, breadth, sentiment, and the dominant signal types.

Daily Filing Activity

Filings per day across the week. Look for surges that line up with month-end or sector-specific results clusters.

Sentiment Split

Keyword-based read on tone: positive (wins, growth, expansion), negative (losses, penalties, resignations), neutral (procedural).

Signal Type Distribution — what was the week really about?

Each filing can match multiple signal types (e.g., a result announcement that also mentions a dividend). Bars show count of filings carrying each signal.
